// INSTRUCTIONS: Copy this file to 'godot-mcp.config.json' and fill in your paths
// NOTES: godotPath: Optional. Path to Godot executable. Auto-detected if not set.
godotProjectPath: Optional. Points tools to your game project. Without this, the server may find the wrong project.godot.
You can also set GODOT_PATH and GODOT_PROJECT_PATH as environment variables in your MCP client config instead.
